MEETING: _TEST_CUSTOMER — Wiz Sensor POV kickoff
DATE: 2026-05-05T17:30:00.000Z

========================================
Speaker: Jane Smith: We want a timeboxed Sensor POV on Azure production — success means runtime coverage parity with Cloud findings for our top ten toxic combinations.
Speaker: John Doe: Budget is approved for the POV window only; if we hit the metrics, we move Sensor to procurement like we did for Cloud.
Speaker: John Doe: My sponsorship is active, but Jane is still transitioning out, so keep champion transition in progress until interim owners complete handoff.
Speaker: Jane Smith: Daily Activity should capture this as the Sensor POV kickoff with success metrics and ownership actions.
Speaker: SE: I will track Sensor as POV/evaluation in Deal Stage Tracker, keep champion transition in progress, and capture the success criteria in Daily Activity prep for the next UCN pass.
